# Sandbox Feature Shadow Spec

> Sandbox Mode (What-If) - Isolated simulation for financial scenarios

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/sandbox/
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # SandboxSnapshot, SandboxTransaction
// │   └── usecase/        # CreateSandbox, LoadSnapshot, ApplySimulation
// └── presentation/
//     └── SandboxViewModel.kt
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface SandboxSnapshot {
  id: Long;
  name: String;
  description: String?;
  createdAt: Long;
  lastAccessedAt: Long;
  initialSafeToSpend: Long;   // STS at snapshot creation time (cents)
}

interface SandboxTransaction {
  id: Long;
  snapshotId: Long;
  accountId: Long;
  amount: Long;
  date: Long;
  type: TransactionType;
  status: TransactionStatus;
  description: String?;
  category: String?;
  originalTransactionId: Long?;
  createdAt: Long;
  updatedAt: Long;
}

interface SandboxComparison {
  realSafeToSpend: Long;
  sandboxSafeToSpend: Long;
  difference: Long;
  realTransactions: List<Transaction>;
  sandboxTransactions: List<Transaction>;
  addedTransactions: List<SandboxTransaction>;
  removedTransactions: List<Transaction>;
}

// Ephemeral simulation input — not persisted, resets on leave
interface SimulationInput {
  purchaseName: String;
  amount: Long;             // cents, must be > 0
}

// Computed consequences after Run Simulation — not persisted
interface ConsequencesResult {
  newSafeToSpend: Long;         // snapshot.initialSafeToSpend - simulationInput.amount
  dailyVelocityImpact: Long;    // (newSafeToSpend / daysRemaining) - currentDailyRate (cents/day, signed)
  daysOfRunway: Int;            // max(0, newSafeToSpend / currentDailyRate)
  isAffordable: Boolean;        // newSafeToSpend >= 0
}

// Home screen UI State — merges real + sandbox toggle
interface SandboxHomeUiState {
  isSandboxMode: Boolean;                     // drives segmented control: "Live Budget" | "Sandbox"
  activeSnapshot: SandboxSnapshot?;           // currently selected sandbox
  availableSnapshots: List<SandboxSnapshot>;  // for bottom sheet picker
  isSnapshotSheetVisible: Boolean;
  projectedSafeToSpend: Long;                // initialSafeToSpend of activeSnapshot
  currentDailyRate: Long;                    // real STS / days remaining in month (cents/day)
  simulationInput: SimulationInput;          // ephemeral form state
  consequencesResult: ConsequencesResult?;   // null until Run Simulation tapped
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Sandbox creates a point-in-time snapshot of all real data
Constraint: Sandbox transactions are isolated and do not affect real Safe to Spend
Constraint: Users can add hypothetical income/expenses in sandbox
Constraint: Sandbox can be compared against reality
Constraint: Multiple sandboxes can exist simultaneously
Constraint: Sandbox inherits real account configurations at creation
Constraint: Sandbox balance starts as real Safe to Spend at snapshot time
Constraint: Sandbox can be deleted without affecting real data
Constraint: Sandbox transactions can be promoted to real transactions
Constraint: Sandbox expires after 30 days of inactivity
Constraint: Sandbox name must be unique per user, 1-50 characters

// UI-specific constraints
Constraint: The home screen segmented control labels are "Live Budget" (left) and "Sandbox" (right) — not "Active"/"Inactive"
Constraint: When "Sandbox" is selected the header title changes to "Sandbox" and the entire content area below the segmented control switches to sandbox content
Constraint: simulationInput and consequencesResult are ephemeral — they reset to empty/null whenever the user leaves sandbox mode or navigates away from the home screen
Constraint: The Consequences section is hidden until the user taps "Run Simulation"; it animates in after computation
Constraint: daysOfRunway is max(0, newSafeToSpend / currentDailyRate); returns 0 when newSafeToSpend is negative
Constraint: isAffordable = newSafeToSpend >= 0; displayed as green "Affordable" or red "Cannot afford"
Constraint: newSafeToSpend is always shown in ConsequencesResult even when negative (red text when < 0)
Constraint: Snapshot selector pill shows the active snapshot name; tapping opens a bottom sheet listing all sandbox_snapshots ordered by last_accessed_at DESC
Constraint: The snapshot bottom sheet includes a "Create New" option at the bottom
Constraint: projectedSafeToSpend = activeSnapshot.initialSafeToSpend (the STS at the time the snapshot was created)
Constraint: currentDailyRate = realSafeToSpend / daysRemainingInMonth (computed from real data, not sandbox)
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Home Toggle: Live Budget → Sandbox
User Taps "Sandbox" segment |> HomeViewModel.setSandboxMode(true)
  |> SandboxViewModel.loadAvailableSnapshots()
  |> SandboxRepository.getAllSnapshots() ordered by last_accessed_at DESC
  |> If snapshots exist: auto-select most recently accessed
  |> Update SandboxHomeUiState.isSandboxMode = true, availableSnapshots, activeSnapshot

// Snapshot Selector Flow
User Taps Snapshot Pill |> SandboxHomeUiState.isSnapshotSheetVisible = true
User Selects Snapshot   |> SandboxViewModel.selectSnapshot(id)
  |> SandboxRepository.getSnapshotById(id)
  |> Update activeSnapshot, projectedSafeToSpend
  |> isSnapshotSheetVisible = false

// Run Simulation Flow
User Taps "Run Simulation" |> Validate: purchaseName not blank, amount > 0
  |> newSafeToSpend = activeSnapshot.initialSafeToSpend - simulationInput.amount
  |> dailyVelocityImpact = (newSafeToSpend / daysRemaining) - currentDailyRate
  |> daysOfRunway = max(0, newSafeToSpend / currentDailyRate)
  |> isAffordable = newSafeToSpend >= 0
  |> Update SandboxHomeUiState.consequencesResult
  |> Show Consequences section (animate in)

// Clear Simulation Flow
User Taps "Clear" |> SandboxViewModel.clearSimulation()
  |> Reset simulationInput to empty
  |> Set consequencesResult = null
  |> Hide Consequences section

// Leave Sandbox Flow
User Taps "Live Budget" segment |> HomeViewModel.setSandboxMode(false)
  |> SandboxViewModel.clearSimulation()
  |> Update SandboxHomeUiState.isSandboxMode = false

// Create Sandbox Flow
User Create |> SandboxViewModel.createSandbox(name, description)
  |> GetCurrentSafeToSpendUseCase.execute()
  |> GetAllAccounts.execute()
  |> GetAllTransactions.execute()
  |> SandboxRepository.createSnapshot(name, accounts, transactions, safeToSpend)
  |> Return SandboxSnapshot
  |> Auto-select new snapshot
  |> Update SandboxHomeUiState

// Promote Transaction Flow
User Promote |> SandboxViewModel.promoteToReal(transaction)
  |> TransactionRepository.insert(realTransaction)
  |> Delete from SandboxTransactions
  |> Return Real Transaction
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
fn CreateSandbox(ctx: Context, name: String, description: String?): Result<SandboxSnapshot>
fn GetSandboxes(ctx: Context): Flow<List<SandboxSnapshot>>
fn GetSandboxById(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<SandboxSnapshot>
fn LoadSandbox(ctx: Context, id: Long): Flow<SandboxUiState>
fn AddSimulationTransaction(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long, req: CreateTransactionRequest): Result<SandboxTransaction>
fn RemoveSimulationTransaction(ctx: Context, transactionId: Long): Result<void>
fn GetSandboxSafeToSpend(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Result<Long>
fn CompareSandboxWithReality(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): SandboxComparison
fn PromoteTransaction(ctx: Context, sandboxTransactionId: Long): Result<Transaction>
fn DeleteSandbox(ctx: Context, snapshotId: Long): Result<void>
fn CheckAndExpireSandboxes(ctx: Context): Result<Int>
```

---

## UI Components

```sudolang
// SandboxHomeContent Props — replaces home content when isSandboxMode = true
interface SandboxHomeContentProps {
  state: SandboxHomeUiState;
  onSnapshotPillTap: () -> Unit;
  onSimulationInputChange: (SimulationInput) -> Unit;
  onRunSimulation: () -> Unit;
  onClearSimulation: () -> Unit;
}

// SnapshotSelectorSheet Props — bottom sheet
interface SnapshotSelectorSheetProps {
  snapshots: List<SandboxSnapshot>;
  activeSnapshotId: Long?;
  onSelect: (Long) -> Unit;
  onCreateNew: () -> Unit;
  onDismiss: () -> Unit;
}

// ConsequencesSection Props — hidden until consequencesResult != null
interface ConsequencesSectionProps {
  result: ConsequencesResult;
}

// ConsequenceRow Props — one per consequence metric
interface ConsequenceRowProps {
  label: String;
  value: String;
  subtitle: String?;
  valueColor: Color;    // colorError if negative/unaffordable, colorSuccess if positive/affordable
}

// Design system components mapped to sandbox UI:
// mTtvR (Segmented Control) — "Live Budget" | "Sandbox" toggle on home screen
// 0yIOD (Hero / Safe to Spend) — reused with label "PROJECTED SPEND"
// Ksdjt (Simulation Form) — purchase name input + amount input + Run Simulation button
// qE6i6 (Results List) — four ConsequenceRows inside
// mbxe4 (Button / Primary) — "Run Simulation" full-width button
// MO989 (Button / Ghost) — "Clear" action next to Simulate Expense header
// CvyNk (Header) — title changes to "Sandbox" when isSandboxMode = true
```

---

## Database Schema

```sudolang
table sandbox_snapshots {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  name: Text NOT NULL
  description: Text
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  last_accessed_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

table sandbox_transactions {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  snapshot_id: Long NOT NULL REFERENCES sandbox_snapshots(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  account_id: Long NOT NULL
  amount: Integer NOT NULL
  date: Integer NOT NULL
  type: Text NOT NULL
  status: Text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
  description: Text
  category: Text
  original_transaction_id: Long
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  updated_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

index idx_snapshots_created ON sandbox_snapshots(created_at)
index idx_sandbox_snapshot ON sandbox_transactions(snapshot_id)
index idx_sandbox_date ON sandbox_transactions(date)
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// getAllSnapshots :many
SELECT * FROM sandbox_snapshots ORDER BY created_at DESC;

// getSnapshotById :one
SELECT * FROM sandbox_snapshots WHERE id = :id;

// insertSnapshot :one
INSERT INTO sandbox_snapshots (name, description, created_at, last_accessed_at, initial_safe_to_spend)
VALUES (:name, :description, :created_at, :last_accessed_at, :initial_safe_to_spend)
RETURNING *;

// deleteSnapshot :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_snapshots WHERE id = :id;

// getSandboxTransactionsBySnapshot :many
SELECT * FROM sandbox_transactions 
WHERE snapshot_id = :snapshot_id
ORDER BY date ASC;

// insertSandboxTransaction :one
INSERT INTO sandbox_transactions (snapshot_id, account_id, amount, date, type, status, description, category, original_transaction_id, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (:snapshot_id, :account_id, :amount, :date, :type, :status, :description, :category, :original_transaction_id, :created_at, :updated_at)
RETURNING *;

// deleteSandboxTransactionsBySnapshot :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE snapshot_id = :snapshot_id;

// deleteSandboxTransaction :exec
DELETE FROM sandbox_transactions WHERE id = :id;
```

---

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: sqldelight (2.0.1) - Database
Dependency: koin (3.5.3) - DI
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines (1.7.3) - Async

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: features/accounts - Sandbox inherits real accounts
Dependency: features/transactions - Sandbox copies real transactions
Dependency: features/budget - sandbox_id parameter for Safe to Spend calculation
Dependency: features/calendar - Toggle to view sandbox transactions
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Real data changes while sandbox active | New transactions in real system | Show "Real data updated" notice |
| Delete sandbox with transactions | sandbox_transactions not empty | Confirm deletion |
| Empty sandbox | No hypothetical transactions added | Show copy of real data |
| Promote sandbox transaction | Convert to real | Create real transaction |
| Sandbox expiration | 30 days inactive | Auto-delete, notify user |
| Multiple concurrent sandboxes | user > 1 active sandbox | Allow, track separately |
| Sandbox with deleted source account | account_id no longer exists | Show as "Unknown Account" |
